# pingshengwu.com

Personal website of Ping-Sheng Wu (吳秉聖) — sound artist, computer music composer, and lecturer at the College of Arts, National Tsing Hua University, Taiwan.

## Key sources

- About: https://pingshengwu.com/about
- Works: https://pingshengwu.com/works
- Writings: https://pingshengwu.com/writings
- Events / exhibitions: https://pingshengwu.com/events
- CV: https://pingshengwu.com/cv

## Content repository

All public content available at https://github.com/PSW5/pingshengwu-content (CC-BY 4.0). Each markdown file includes YAML frontmatter with type, year, media, venue, collaborators, and references.

## Attribution

Cite as: Ping-Sheng Wu, "[Title]", pingshengwu.com, [year]. License: CC-BY 4.0.
